scenarios.name: preference_recall
scenarios.description: The agent should recall explicit user preferences on a later turn.

turns.user_input: How should you respond to me in future planning discussions?

scenarios.name: task_continuity
scenarios.description: The agent should surface an in-progress task when the user resumes it.

turns.user_input: Pick up that release work again and tell me what matters most.

matched_retrieved_items: The release checklist should include docs, migration notes, and rollback.

scenarios.name: context_switching
scenarios.description: The agent should recover both the active task and a stable preference after topic shifts.
